author: Gigi
title: 24: Building FIPS w/ Johnathan Corgan
description: Draft chapter map for episode 24, Building FIPS w/ Johnathan Corgan.

chapters.title: Why FIPS started with Arjen asking for networking that does not depend…
Transport-agnostic networking: Ethernet, Bluetooth, UDP overlays, Tor…
Why robustness under ugly conditions matters more than looking elegant…
The next FIPS release: fewer unnecessary pieces, stronger protocol…
Why Nostr feels miraculous if you remember the world before it, even if…
Claude Code wrote most of FIPS only after two months of protocol…
Agentic coding as a force multiplier, not a substitute for thought: bad…
